start_speaking: Start speaking to begin the conversation

doctorAppointment.title: Schedule a Doctor's Appointment
doctorAppointment.description: You're calling your doctor's office to schedule a routine checkup. The receptionist will answer and help you find an available time slot. Be ready to provide your availability and ask about any preparation needed for the appointment.

jobInterview.title: Tell Me About Yourself
jobInterview.description: You're in a job interview and the interviewer asks you to introduce yourself. This is your chance to give a compelling 2-minute summary of your background, skills, and why you're interested in this role. The interviewer may ask follow-up questions.

coffeeShop.title: Order at a Coffee Shop
coffeeShop.description: You're at a busy coffee shop and ready to order. The barista is friendly but the line is moving quickly. Order your preferred drink with any customizations (size, milk type, extras) and perhaps a pastry. Handle any questions about your order.

newColleague.title: Meet a New Colleague
newColleague.description: It's your first day at a new job and you're meeting a colleague in the break room. Introduce yourself, make small talk about the workplace, and try to build a friendly connection. Ask questions to show interest in them.

quick_start_subtitle: Popular scenarios to get you started
begin_failed: Couldn't start the scenario. Please try again.
objectives_loading: Practice this scenario naturally. Focus on clear communication and staying calm.
objectives_in_call_hint: Speak naturally. The AI will guide you toward your objectives.

tab.title: Scenario Practice
tab.subtitle: Practice real-world conversations in a safe, supportive environment
tab.noSessionsDescription: Start practicing real-world conversations by creating your first scenario

categoryDescriptions.job_interview: Practice interview questions and professional responses
categoryDescriptions.ordering_food: Practice ordering at restaurants and cafes

phoneCall.title: Schedule an appointment
phoneCall.description: Call to book a service appointment

orderingFood.title: Restaurant order
orderingFood.description: Order a meal and make special requests

medicalAppointment.title: Describe symptoms
medicalAppointment.description: Explain health concerns to a doctor

publicSpeaking.title: Brief presentation
publicSpeaking.description: Deliver a short presentation on a topic

customerService.title: Return an item
customerService.description: Handle a product return or exchange

briefing.label: Scenario
briefing.modeHelper: You can change this any time.

modeGuided.label: Guided
modeGuided.description: Start and stop whenever you want. You control the pace.
modeGuided.tooltip: The microphone waits for you. Start speaking when you're ready and stop when you're done , nothing interrupts.

modeRealistic.label: Realistic
modeRealistic.description: Open mic, natural flow. Replies can come while you're still speaking.
modeRealistic.tooltip: The microphone stays open. Replies can arrive while you talk, even mid-sentence, like a real conversation.

ready.title: Ready when you are
ready.description: Take a moment to review the objectives below. The conversation starts when you press Start.

tips.job_interview: Sit up straight, picture the interviewer across the desk, and treat the first question like the real thing.
tips.phone_call: Imagine holding a phone to your ear and speak as if the other person can only hear your voice, not see you.
tips.social_interaction: Picture yourself walking up to someone new. Keep it light and let the small talk flow.
tips.ordering_food: Picture the counter in front of you and the line behind. Decide your order before you start.
tips.medical_appointment: Imagine you are in the room with the doctor. Be ready to describe how you feel in your own words.
tips.public_speaking: Stand if you can, picture the room looking back at you, and take one breath before your first line.
tips.customer_service: Picture the person who can help you. Say what you need clearly and stay calm if it takes a moment.
tips.other: Take a moment to picture where this conversation happens and who you are speaking to before you start.

realtime.emptyLive: The conversation will appear here as you speak.

fallback.title: Switched to guided mode
fallback.description: We hit a snag with the live call , you can keep going in guided mode.

errors.missing_session: We couldn't find this scenario session
errors.ticket_failed: Couldn't get permission to start the live call
errors.audio_unsupported: Your browser doesn't support realtime audio

session.title: Scenario Practice
session.startConversation: Start the conversation by typing or recording your first message.
session.speakNaturally: Speak naturally - take your time and express yourself clearly.
session.textPlaceholder: Type your message... (Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
session.clickToRecord: Click the microphone to start recording
session.voiceNote: Note: Voice transcription coming soon. Use text input for now.
session.voiceComingSoon: Voice transcription is coming soon. Please use text input for now.
session.failedToSend: Failed to send message. Please try again.
session.emptyTranscription: Could not detect speech in the recording. Please try again.
session.transcriptionError: Failed to process your recording. Please try again.
session.tap_to_play_greeting_title: Can't hear the AI? Tap to play the greeting.
session.sessionSavedSubtitle: You made progress! Review what you accomplished.
session.endEarlyError: Failed to save session. Please try again.
session.leaveSessionWarning: If you leave now, this practice session will be deleted and cannot be resumed. Your progress will be lost.
session.abandonError: Failed to end session. Please try again.
session.recordingTooShort: Recording too short. Please record for at least 1 second.
session.session_complete_subtitle: Great job! Review your performance below.

review.analysisNotAvailable: Analysis not available for this session.
review.notesHelperText: Record your thoughts about this session - what went well, what you'd do differently, or any insights.
review.notesPlaceholder: What did you learn from this scenario? What would you do differently next time?
review.notesHelperTextTherapist: Add observations, feedback, or follow-up notes for this patient's session.
review.notesPlaceholderTherapist: Note any patterns, progress, or areas to address in the next session...
review.computerVoiceHint: Real audio still uploading , refresh in a moment to hear it

create.title: Create New Scenario
create.description: Describe a real-world situation you'd like to practice. Be specific about the context, who you're talking to, and what you're trying to accomplish.
create.categoryHelperText: Choose a category to guide the conversation
create.descriptionHelperText: Example: 'I'm calling to schedule a doctor's appointment. I need to describe my symptoms and ask about available times.'
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the scenario you want to practice...
create.descriptionRequired: Please describe the scenario you want to practice
create.failedToCreate: Failed to create scenario. Please try again.
create.tip1: Be specific about the situation and context
create.tip2: Include who you're talking to (receptionist, interviewer, etc.)
create.tip3: State your goal (scheduling, asking for information, etc.)
create.tip4: Mention any challenges you want to practice handling

categoryModal.pickExample: Pick an example or write your own
categoryModal.customHelperText: Describe the specific situation you want to practice

job_interview: Practice answering 'Tell me about yourself' in a professional interview setting
Prepare for behavioral questions like 'Describe a challenge you overcame'
Practice negotiating salary and benefits with a hiring manager
phone_call: Call to schedule a doctor's appointment and describe your symptoms
Call customer service to resolve a billing issue
Make a reservation at a restaurant for a special occasion
social_interaction: Introduce yourself at a networking event and make small talk
Start a conversation with a neighbor you've just met
Join a group conversation at a party
ordering_food: Order a coffee with specific customizations at a busy café
Order dinner at a restaurant and ask about menu items
Order food for pickup over the phone
medical_appointment: Describe your symptoms clearly to a doctor during a checkup
Ask questions about a diagnosis and treatment options
Discuss medication side effects with a pharmacist
public_speaking: Give a brief introduction of yourself to a group
Present a project update to your team
Deliver a short toast at a celebration
customer_service: Return an item and explain why it didn't meet your expectations
Ask for help finding a product in a store
Complain politely about poor service and request a resolution
other: Practice a conversation that's been on your mind
Rehearse for an upcoming important discussion
Work through a challenging communication scenario
